---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

<!-- Describe the situation that prompted the request. What does the current app NOT do well? -->


## Proposed solution

<!-- What would you like PCDoctor Workbench to do instead? -->


## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- Other tools, workarounds, or approaches you've thought about. -->


## Additional context

<!-- Screenshots, mockups, links to similar features in other tools, etc. -->


## Checklist

- [ ] I've checked existing issues to make sure this isn't a duplicate
- [ ] This is for **PCDoctor Workbench** specifically (not a third-party tool that PCDoctor launches like HWiNFO or OCCT)
- [ ] I understand this is a personal tool with no support contract — feature requests are weighed against the maintainer's roadmap, which is non-public

---

**Note:** PCDoctor Workbench is hardcoded for a specific personal setup (Alienware Aurora R11, specific NAS layout, English Win 11). Feature requests that would require generalizing those assumptions are unlikely to ship as a default; they'd likely be added to [`docs/PUBLIC_READINESS.md`](https://github.com/gregpa/pcdoctor-workbench/blob/main/docs/PUBLIC_READINESS.md) as fork-it-yourself work.
